details: The scheme "Bhajan Competition" is a Cultural scheme by the Department of Art, Culture and Museums, Government of Goa. It aims to preserve and promote the tradition of Bhajan singing. Competition is organized at the Regional level and the selected group from this competition will participate at the State Level. Entries are invited through local press notes, and participation is open to all Goan groups. Each group is eligible for transport charges for one 10–15 seater vehicle as per government rates.
benefits: 1st Prize – ₹9,000/-, 2nd Prize – ₹7,000/-, 3rd Prize – ₹5,000/-, Three Consolation Prizes – ₹3,000/- each
1st Prize – ₹7,000/-, 2nd Prize – ₹5,000/-, 3rd Prize – ₹3,000/-, Three Consolation Prizes – ₹2,000/- each
Best Vocalist (1st Abhang) – ₹1,500/-, Best Vocalist (2nd Abhang) – ₹1,500/-, Best Vocalist (Gavlan) – ₹1,500/-, Best Pakhawaj Player – ₹1,500/-, Best Harmonium Player – ₹1,500/-
1st Prize – ₹5,000/-, 2nd Prize – ₹3,000/-, 3rd Prize – ₹2,000/-, Three Consolation Prizes – ₹1,000/- each
Best Vocalist (1st Abhang) – ₹1,000/-, Best Vocalist (2nd Abhang) – ₹1,000/-, Best Vocalist (Gavlan) – ₹1,000/-, Best Pakhawaj Player – ₹1,000/-, Best Harmonium Player – ₹1,000/-
1st Prize – ₹75,000/-, 2nd Prize – ₹50,000/-, 3rd Prize – ₹40,000/-, 4th Prize – ₹30,000/-, Two Consolation Prizes – ₹20,000/- each
1st Prize – ₹35,000/-, 2nd Prize – ₹30,000/-, 3rd Prize – ₹25,000/-, 4th Prize – ₹20,000/-, Two Consolation Prizes – ₹10,000/- each
1st Prize – ₹25,000/-, 2nd Prize – ₹20,000/-, 3rd Prize – ₹15,000/-, 4th Prize – ₹10,000/-, Two Consolation Prizes – ₹5,000/- each
*Transport charges for one 10–15 seater vehicle will be paid as per government rates to each participating group.
eligibility: The Competition is open to all Goan groups.

offline: The prescribed format of the application form is provided in the entries invited by the Kala Academy by releasing press note in local dailies.

In the application form, fill in all the mandatory fields, paste the passport-sized photograph (signed across, if required), and attach copies of all the mandatory documents (self-attest, if required).
Submit the duly filled and signed application form along with the documents, within the prescribed period (if any), to the
Member Secretary, Kala Academy, Panaji, Goa
Member Secretary/ Chairman, Kala Academy, Goa.

documents_required: Proof that the group is from Goa.

faqs.question: Who can participate in this singing competition, and are there any restrictions based on location?
faqs.answer: The competition is open to all groups from Goa, with no restrictions mentioned beyond being Goan participants.

faqs.question: How are applicants informed about this competition and its application process?
faqs.answer: Entries are invited through press notes published in local newspapers, providing details about participation.

faqs.question: Where can interested participants obtain the entry form and competition rules?
faqs.answer: Entry forms along with rules and regulations are available at Kala Academy, Goa.

faqs.question: Is there a specific deadline for submitting entries, and where should they be sent?
faqs.answer: Entries must be submitted within the stipulated date mentioned in the press note, to the Member Secretary, Kala Academy Goa.

faqs.question: What is the selection process for participants at the regional and state levels?
faqs.answer: Selection is based on the entries received, with regional winners progressing to the state-level competition.

faqs.question: Is there any financial assistance provided for participating groups traveling to the event?
faqs.answer: Yes, to-and-fro transport charges as per government rates for one 10-15 seater vehicle are provided per institution.

faqs.question: What are the prize amounts for winners in the male category at the regional level?
faqs.answer: 1st prize: ₹9,000/-, 2nd prize: ₹7,000/-, 3rd prize: ₹5,000/-, and three consolation prizes of ₹3,000/- each.

faqs.question: Are there individual prizes for vocalists and accompanists in the male category at regional competitions?
faqs.answer: Yes, best vocalists (1st Abhang, 2nd Abhang, Gavlan) and accompanists (Pakhawaj, Harmonium) receive ₹2,000/- each.

faqs.question: What prizes are awarded in the female category at the regional level?
faqs.answer: 1st prize: ₹7,000/-, 2nd prize: ₹5,000/-, 3rd prize: ₹3,000/-, and three consolation prizes of ₹2,000/- each.

faqs.question: What are the prize details for the children’s category at the regional level?
faqs.answer: 1st prize: ₹5,000/-, 2nd prize: ₹3,000/-, 3rd prize: ₹2,000/-, and three consolation prizes of ₹1,000/- each.

faqs.question: Do children participants receive individual prizes for their performances?
faqs.answer: Yes, best vocalists and accompanists in children’s category receive ₹1,000/- each.

faqs.question: How many centers host the regional competitions for male, female, and children categories?
faqs.answer: Approximately 6 centers for males, 7 for females, and 4 for children.

faqs.question: Are there individual awards for male participants at the state level?
faqs.answer: Yes, best vocalists and accompanists receive 1st prize (₹5,000/-) and 2nd prize (₹3,000/-) in each sub-category.

faqs.question: Who should be contacted for submitting competition entries, and where?
faqs.answer: Entries must be submitted to the Member Secretary, Kala Academy Goa.
